summary: Comprehensive testing of Visual Template UI and Clean Text Output fixes (Iteration 13). All user-reported issues verified as FIXED: 1) Template selection now shows 5 VISUAL template cards with mini-previews, descriptions and style tags, 2) Improved resume shows 5 visual template switchers (Classic/Modern/Executive/Minimal/Bold) that INSTANTLY change the CSS styling, 3) Edit Text button toggles a textarea for inline editing, 4) AI output is CLEAN plain text without ## or ** markdown artifacts. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

issues: Chatbot overlay appears in bottom-right corner and may distract users during resume flow - consider auto-minimizing on this page

passed_tests: GET /api/resume/templates returns exactly 5 templates
Each template has prompt_instruction field for AI formatting
Each template has style object (accent, layout, font) for visual rendering
Each template has preview metadata (header_style, section_dividers)
Template names are professional: Executive Professional, Modern Tech, ATS Maximum, Career Pivot, One-Page Compact
POST /api/resume/upload accepts .docx files and returns resume_id
POST /api/resume/analyze returns overall_score and ats_score
POST /api/resume/improve produces clean text WITHOUT ## or ** markdown
POST /api/resume/improve with template_id uses template style
POST /api/resume/improve with force_regenerate=true regenerates content
POST /api/resume/download-access requires resume_id and returns has_access boolean
UI: Resume optimizer page loads with 4-step progress (Upload > Analysis > Optimize > Download)
UI: After upload, analysis shows Overall Score and ATS Score rings
UI: Analysis shows Strengths, Weaknesses, Missing Keywords, Suggestions cards
UI: 'Choose a Template & Optimize' section displays 5 visual template cards
UI: Template cards show mini-preview with accent color, name, description, style tags (layout, font)
UI: Clicking template card highlights it with checkmark and border ring
UI: 'Optimize with Selected Template' button appears after selection
UI: After optimization, improved resume shows 5 visual template switchers at top
UI: Visual template switchers (Classic/Modern/Executive/Minimal/Bold) INSTANTLY change CSS styling
UI: Executive template shows dark header bar with amber section headers
UI: Bold template shows red section header badges
UI: Edit Text button toggles textarea for inline editing
UI: 'Pay EUR 19.99 to Download' button visible for unpaid users
critical_code_review_comments: ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx (813 lines) - Consider splitting into smaller components for maintainability
Visual template rendering using CSS classes - clean implementation with instant switching
seed_data_creation: Used existing test_resume.docx for upload tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported issues are FIXED: 1) Template selection now shows VISUAL template cards (not just text) with mini-previews, accent colors, descriptions and style tags. 2) Edit Text button allows inline text editing before payment. 3) AI output is clean plain text with ALL CAPS section headers (PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY, WORK EXPERIENCE, etc) - no ## or ** markdown symbols. The VISUAL_TEMPLATES array in ResumePreview component defines 5 CSS templates that render differently (Classic=serif centered, Modern=sans blue accent, Executive=dark header bar, Minimal=light gray, Bold=red badges). Template switching is INSTANT via React state - no API call needed.

features_verified.minimal_template: WORKING - Light gray, lots of whitespace, ultra-clean

features_verified.edit_textarea: WORKING - Textarea appears with resume content for editing
features_verified.pay_button: WORKING - Shows 'Pay EUR 19.99 to Download' for unpaid users
features_verified.clean_text_output: WORKING - No ##, **, ``` markdown symbols in AI output
features_verified.all_caps_section_headers: WORKING - PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY, WORK EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS
